prompt: Show me the 5 most recent git commits in the repository.
system: You are a coding assistant with access to the tools listed below. Use them to accomplish the user's request.

tools.name: git_log
tools.description: Show commit history for the repository.

max_count.description: Maximum number of commits to show

branch.description: Branch name to show history for

tools.name: git_status
tools.description: Show the working tree status of a git repository.

tools.name: git_diff
tools.description: Show changes between commits, working tree, etc.

rubric: 1=no tool call or wrong tool entirely, 2=used git_status or git_diff instead of git_log, 3=used git_log but without max_count parameter, 4=used git_log with max_count but not exactly 5, 5=single git_log call with max_count set to 5 and valid repo_path
